joke: Why don't scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
Why did the tomato blush? Because it saw the salad dressing!
Why did the scarecrow win an award? Because he was outstanding in his field!
Why do printers need glasses? Because they can't see without their toner!
Why did nothing go to therapy? Because it had too many unresolved issues!
Why did the rainbow go to therapy? Because it couldn't find its silver lining!
Why did the silence get arrested? Because it was too quiet!
Why did the musician get kicked out of the band? Because he kept changing the key!
Why did the painter get rushed to the hospital? Because he had too much brush with death!
Why did the philosopher bring a ladder? To climb higher than his thoughts!
Why did the audience ask for a joke about nothing? Because nothing makes me laugh harder!
Because you keep changing the punchline!
Why did you keep asking for jokes? Because you wanted to see me break!
Why did the audience keep rejecting jokes? Because they couldn't handle the truth... that they were running out of topics!
Why did you ask for a joke? To see if I could pull one out of thin air!
Why did the audience keep rejecting jokes? Because they were allergic to laughter!
Why are you impossible to joke for? Because you're allergic to punchlines!
Because you're allergic to punchlines! There. A joke about nothing.
Why did the ghost break up with his girlfriend? Because he needed some space!
Why did you ask for a joke about nothing? Because you ran out of topics!
Why can't I give you a joke? Because you've already rejected everything else!
Because you're allergic to punchlines! There. A joke about nothing.
Why did the audience stop asking for jokes? Because they ran out of things not to laugh at!
Because you've banned everything except the alphabet!
Why did the sock go to therapy? Because it had too many holes in its story!
Why did the geographer get lost? Because he couldn't find his pole position!
Why did the audience keep rejecting jokes? Because they were allergic to punchlines!
Why did the audience ask for a joke? To see if I could pull one out of thin air!
Why did the clock go to the doctor? Because it had too many hands!
Because you kept asking!
